widgets_values: If you want to add a Light Mask, place it here
Briefly describe the subject of your original image here
Briefly describe the kind of light you wish to use for relighting here

Set your Denoise value for regeneration here:
- Low (0.1-0.3) = background stays basically the same
- Average (0.3-0.6) = background changes a bit
- High (0.6-1) = background changes a lot

Higher Max = More Whites
Lower Min = More Blacks
